case_title: WINGS FINANCIAL CREDIT UNION VS. BRADLEY M REDMOND et al

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) AND ADMITTING A COPY IN LIEU OF THE ORIGINAL EVIDENCE CODE 1531 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINGS FINANCIAL CREDIT UNION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINGS FINANCIAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REDMOND, BRADLEY M AN INDIVIDUAL $8,368.08 PRINCIPAL, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $469.26 INTEREST, $264.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,276.34, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 16, 2012 A NOTICE OF STAY WAS FILED ON 11/5/12
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
